demo.title: harness.sh
demo.code:
# Pair this Bankr account with your Harness account (get the code from Harness app > Settings > Bankr)
bankr prompt "Pair my Harness account with pairing code ABC123"

# Inspect the Harness trading wallet and portfolio
bankr prompt "Show my Harness wallet summary"

# Fund the Harness wallet from this Bankr wallet
bankr prompt "Deposit $5 USDC and $1 of ETH on Base into my Harness wallet"

# Top up Harness credits with $HARNESS over x402
bankr prompt "Buy the $10 Harness credit pack with $HARNESS"

# Watch or stop what the Harness agent is doing
bankr prompt "List my Harness sessions"
bankr prompt "Cancel Harness session <id>"

# Emergency: revoke the Harness trading wallet
bankr prompt "Revoke my Harness trading wallet"

setup: Create a Harness account at https://tryharness.ai and get a pairing code from Settings > Bankr
Pair once: the skill signs the domain-separated `harness-pair v2` message with this wallet's EVM key and exchanges it for a management token (secret-store only, never displayed)
Fund in one deposit: about $5 USDC plus about $1 of ETH (gas) on Base to the provisioned wallet address
Withdrawals only create a request — the user always approves them inside the Harness app
